feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SBPA: Integrate different projects in visibility dashboard
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Let me first describe some context: 

  • I have 5 projects which all have one or multiple business processes. 
  • A launchpad is set up to start the business processes and see tasks in the Inbox App

My question now is:
How to set up and configure a visibility scenario dashboard without doing so for each project individually? 
Why do I want this?
I'd like to avoid to configure and maintain

  1. a visibility scenario per project
  2. multiple tiles for each visibility scenario dashboard in the launchpad.

My thoughts were to create a new project exclusively for this visibility scenario, where I import the said projects as an dependency. Unfortunately, I get the error stating: "The operation could not be performed due to missing permission.". 

Could somebody share their thoughts on this?
Why do I get the error "Acces denied"? And if there exists a workaround to integrate all business processes in one (1) dashboard.

Looking forward to your feedback. 
C.

entry.title: SUP AATP
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please give me explanation on aATP SUP, how system identify whether it is vertical or horizontal supply protection?

Thanks in advance

Regards

Rinku

entry.title: Help me with this code to display the FG code against each material code.
entry.content:
This is my abap code block

DATA: it_fg_code TYPE TABLE OF mast-matnr,   " Table to store FG Codes
      matnr1      TYPE mast-matnr.           " Variable for single FG Code

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK B1 WITH FRAME TITLE text-001.

SELECT-OPTIONS material FOR mast-matnr.
SELECT-OPTIONS plant FOR mast-werks.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B1.

START-OF-SELECTION.

" Step 1: Fetch FG Code from MAST table for material type 'FERT'
SELECT DISTINCT mast~matnr
  INTO TABLE IT_MTYPE1
  FROM mast
  INNER JOIN mara ON mast~matnr = mara~matnr
  WHERE mast~matnr IN material
    AND mara~MTART = 'FERT'.

" Step 2: Fetch details from MAST, STPO, and MAKt for materials and their exploded parts
SELECT mast~werks
       mast~stlnr
       mast~matnr
       makt~maktx
       idnrk
       stpo~menge
  INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE itm_details
  FROM mast AS mast
  INNER JOIN stpo AS stpo ON mast~stlnr = stpo~stlnr
  INNER JOIN makt AS makt ON mast~matnr = makt~matnr
  WHERE mast~matnr IN material
    AND werks IN plant
    AND stpo~stlty = 'M'
    AND mast~stlal = mast~stlal.

IF NOT itm_details[] IS INITIAL.

  " Step 3: Fetch location data
  SELECT matnr
         werks
         lgpro
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_loc
    FROM marc
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN itm_details
    WHERE werks = itm_details-werks
    AND matnr = itm_details-matnr.

ENDIF.

IF NOT itm_details[] IS INITIAL.

  " Step 4: Fetch verification data for the materials
  SELECT mast~matnr
         mast~werks
         verid
         bdatu
         adatu
         mkal~stlal
         bstma
         idnrk
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_ver
    FROM mast AS mast
    INNER JOIN mkal AS mkal ON mast~matnr = mkal~matnr
    INNER JOIN stpo AS stpo ON mast~stlnr = stpo~stlnr
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN itm_details
    WHERE mast~werks = itm_details-werks
    AND mast~matnr = itm_details-matnr.

ENDIF.

* Step 5: Loop through itm_details and update FG Code for 'FERT' type materials
LOOP AT itm_details INTO DATA(ls_item).

  " Check if material type is 'FERT' by checking against IT_MTYPE1
  READ TABLE it_mtype1 INTO matnr1 WITH KEY matnr = ls_item-matnr.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    " Assign FG Code to the structure only for 'FERT' materials
    ls_item-fg_code = matnr1.  " Assign FG Code to the structure
  ELSE.
    " For exploded parts, set FG code to blank or empty
    ls_item-fg_code = ''.  " No FG code for exploded parts
  ENDIF.

The above mentioned code is displaying this output

I want on the FERT codes to be displayed against it.

entry.title: SFTP
entry.content: hello

entry.title: Year-End Process Duplicated – Retained Earnings Posted Twice
entry.content:
We've encountered an issue where the year-end process was duplicated. Two different users had the year-end closing window open simultaneously.

Initially, they were troubleshooting some errors, and both ended up executing the process. Instead of SAP preventing the duplicate execution or crashing for one of them, the system allowed both executions, resulting in the same amount being posted to Retained Earnings twice.

Has anyone experienced this issue before? Any insights on why this happened?

Thanks

entry.title: Why does SAP close after running a macro script?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

After running the macro script, the report downloads fine but the entire SAP closes. 

The "Windows Script Host" window also appears with the error described: The remote server machine does not exist or is unavaiable session.findByld. Please support. Thanks!

entry.title: SAP SARA WRITE to file. What file type is the file? Ascii, binary?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working on archiving/deleting old IDOCS.  I'm using tcode SARA to test this.  When setting up the logical file, what should be the data type?

Is there a way to view the file to see what's in it?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Access Policies
entry.content:
Access Policies

In SAP Cloud Integration, user permissions are granted in such a way that all tasks can be performed on all artifacts and data. Access policies provide a way to restrict access to selected artifacts and their data.

 

For example, we have the two CPI consultant in one project, the first consultant created an Integration flow but to restrict access to edit the integration, by  Another user then we go for  Access Policies, we can restrict to access to edit  select Integration Flow.

 

Step 1: Login cloud Integration Suite

Step2: Go To Monitoring

 

 

Step3:

Go to Message Security

 

 

Step4:

   Go to Access Policies and create the Access Policies.

 

 

Click on the Access Policies.

 

Click on the plus (+) and create the new Access Policies

Create Access Policy.

Attribute

Description

Role Name

Enter a role name (mandatory). The role name is the name of a custom role that you've to create in your subscriber account.

Description

Enter a description for the role specified (optional).

 

 

Attribute

Description

 

Name

Enter an artifact name (mandatory).

 

Description

Enter an artifact description (optional), which isn’t necessarily the description of the artifact: if you choose the operator Matches, describe the set of artifacts selected by the regular expression (for example: integration artifacts processing data for German employees).

 

Condition

 

Artifact Type

Select an artifact type from the list. By default, preset as Integration Flow.

 

Attribute

Choose either the name or the ID of the integration artifact.

Note

An integration artifact protects the local data stores and variables associated to it. Global data stores and global variables must be protected by the artifact types of Global Data Store and Global Variable respectively.

 

Operator

If you select Equals, you must enter the exact name or ID of the integration artifact.

If you select Matches, the value must be a valid Java regular expression.

    •  

Value

If you choose Equals, enter the ID or the Name of the integration artifact.

 

Expression

Is shown only if you choose Matches.

Enter a regular expression for ID or Name.

Note:

JMS queues, global variables, and global data stores support only names.

 

 

Select Create.

 

After creating the Access Policies. This Access Policies add to the BTP Cockpit.

Go to BTP Cockpit->Security->Role collection->Create the role-collection this role     collection will add to the user.

Step1: Go to BTP cockpit

 

Go to the Trail Account.

 

Go to the Security->Roles

 

Click on the role-search for the Custom Role Template

 

Click on create Role

 

Role Name-Enter the name of the Access Policies

Description-user define

Now click on the next.

 

In the source will static and Value will Access Policy name and click on the enter

Click on Next.

 

We want to select the Role Collection.

Step to create role collection

Go to Security->Role collection -> Create the role collection

 

 

 

Create on the (+) button

 

 

Name: User-define

Description: User-define

Now Click on the Create

Now Assign the Roles to Role Collection

 

Now assign the Role collection to user

Go to the Security ->User ->Assign Role collection to User

 

Click on the user

 

Click on the Assign Role collection

 

Search for the role collection

Click on Assign role collection

 

 

Now Assign role and Role collection to user is completed.

Now to go to the Cloud Integration Suite-> Go integration flow

 By using one user the Integration Flow is we can edit the integration flow

 

Now Edit the Integration Flow

 

 

 

The Integration Flow is Successfully Edit.

Now we will try to edit in user another User

 

 

Open the package1

 

Open test2 integration Flow

 

Now Click on Edit

 

 

The Integration Flow is not Editing by using another user.

entry.title: Search in Community does not consider the content in Comments
entry.content:
Hello Community Admin Team,

Request your help with one thing.
I noticed that the 'Search' in Community does not consider the content in Comments posted for a Blog Post.

I have been updating the Blog Posts using Comments for the latest info and additional updates. Also, readers have been contributing with valuable info which could help many.

Can we do something to have 'Search' also to consider the content in Comments?

Thanks,
Abhijit

SAP Community

entry.title: PLM Engineering record items tab>specification status field is blank
entry.content: I am trying to figure out the configuration to be able to show the Specification status on an Engineering record.  I cannot find the configuration to show this status.  Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Fiori App Analyze PIR Quality
entry.content:
Hi

I want to enable one of the Fiori app for our customer App Name Analyze PIR Quality and the customer version is S/4HANA 2023 FPS 01 and this Fiori app is Deprecated for the version mentioned. Can anyone suggest a alternate app which will work in the version 2023 FPS 01 working same as of Analyze PIR Quality.

Kindly suggest any Alternate App...

Pardeep

entry.title: Encountering "Error in MDDataSetBW.GetCellData" with InfoProvider ZISX002$N – Need Assistance
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am experiencing the following error in my SAP BW system:

The following database error occurred: Error in MDDataSetBW.GetCellData. Error reading the data of InfoProvider ZISX002$N. For information about this error, please refer to SAP Knowledge Base Article 2054721 on the SAP Support Portal. (IES 10901)

I have reviewed the referenced SAP Knowledge Base Article 2054721 but would appreciate further insights. Has anyone encountered this issue before? What troubleshooting steps or configuration adjustments helped resolve this error?

Trobleshooted Issues :

1. We have created index in the backend BW  and ran the Bex query running fine with out any issues

2. We re ran the report and it is getting success.

3. We are receiving intermediate issue with the above issue running in business objects

Data Source is SAP BW - Universe based reports (.unv format)

SAP BOBJ Version : 4.2 SP9

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: Does any one can help me to know where does Stock Type list gets configured in S4HANA
entry.content: I am seeing this list in here, does anyone know where does this list is configured? Please see the screen shot below

entry.title: Customize our solr query

entry.title: maintain inbound delivery showing blocked status
CL_GUI_DIALOGBOX_CONTAINER
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question about an error in the class CL_GUI_DIALOGBOX_CONTAINER/CL_GUI_TOOLBAR
- Transaction VA01
- Enter order type + org. data
- ENTER
- A customer-specific dialog box is created and displayed in PAI screen 4001 / 4900 (amodal screen)
- Unfortunately, the cursor remains on the first BUTTON in the dialog box and not in the field RV45A-MABNR

No change with the SET_FOCUS, FLUSH method, SET_NEW_FCODE
SAPGUI 800 Final Release - 64bit Patch 8 or higher is used.
Thanks for your help

entry.title: **Request for Tools to Create Developer Key**
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I hope you're doing well. We are currently working on creating a new developer key manually for our system. However, we do not have S-user access, and our installation number is set to "INITIAL."

Could you please advise on the appropriate tools or processes we can use to proceed with generating the key under these conditions?

Your assistance is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,
Kiran

entry.title: Unintended line breaks when using code samples
entry.content:
For reference, this is my blog post. I'm having a hard time formatting my post when it comes to the code samples. For every code sample block, the platform seems to add unintended line breaks before and after the code block, which only appear when previewing the post or publishing it, and not while editing it. It might seem minor, but it's really annoying since the spacing between the text and the code blocks is way too big and looks bad.

Even when editing the HTML directly and removing the <p> </p> it adds by itself for every line break, they're added back once you save or preview.

Any way to fix this?

entry.title: Posting Net Pay to Two Different GL Accounts
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

As per our client’s requirement, the /559 net pay balance sheet needs to be posted in two different GL accounts:

Fixed Pay posted to one GL account.
Incentives and Variable Pay posted to a different GL account.
All deductions are based on the fixed salary only. Additionally, the Wages Payable is posted under the fixed component, and the remaining Incentive GL is posted separately.

Could anyone provide insights or suggestions on how to set up this configuration in SAP Payroll to meet this requirement? Any guidance on how to handle the GL postings effectively would be highly appreciated.

Currently /559 posted one GL - Wage payable ( Balance sheet)

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

Jeevanantham

entry.title: Re: PGR not happening while doing the sale return
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am doing MTO Process in ECC System.I have done PGI/Billing, Now i am creating Return w.r.t to the Billing i have created the Return Sales Orders but while doing PGR It is showing me one error, attaching the screenshot as well.

Kindly look upon it and help me in this. I have seen various post posted in community but it not solve by issue

Pardeep
